warnings: This sheet (A-12) shows two separate eave/fascia detail sections, R1 (grid B) and R2 (grid E), at different locations of the roof. Per project convention they are split into separate files: the sibling บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า14_eave_r1.json (R1) and this file (R2).
This is a wood/fiber-cement/metal-roofing detail, not a reinforced-concrete element, so main_bar/stirrup are left null.
